headline: A Look At Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) Valuation After Cash Settlement Move And Seattle Lease Extension
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) is back in focus after two key developments: a cash settlement election on its 2027 exchangeable notes and a long-term lease extension with the Port of Seattle. See our latest analysis for Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings. The recent cash settlement decision and the extended Seattle lease come as the stock trades at US$18.34, with a 7 day share price return of 12.5% but a year to date share price decline of 19.5%. Over 5 years, the total shareholder return...

headline: Is Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) The Best Cruise Stock to Buy Ahead of Summer Travel Boom?
summary: We just covered the Top 10 Stock Picks of Billionaire Paul Singer. Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NYSE:NCLH) ranks #9 (see Top 5 Stock Picks of Billionaire Paul Singer). Elliott’s Stake: $246,578,200 Norwegian Cruise Line is a new addition in billionaire Singer’s portfolio. NCLH bulls believe the stock has more upside despite broader concerns about fuel prices, […]
